task: Describe the current counter value without changing any control. Do not click, type, move the pointer, scroll, or change focus.
Set Workspace label to Atlas 27, choose High priority, mark reviewed, and save the profile.
Set the counter to 3, set Intensity to 70, and confirm the local verification dialog.
Run the delayed operation until it completes, then activate target 17 in the scrollable region.
Focus the keyboard test pad and press Up followed by Enter.
Activate the control inside the embedded surface.
On the canvas, select the blue circle and drag the orange square into the green drop zone.

Set Workspace label to Atlas 27, choose High priority, mark reviewed, and save. Set the counter to 3 and Intensity to 70, then confirm the local verification dialog. Run the delayed operation until complete and activate target 17. Focus the keyboard pad and press Up followed by Enter. Activate the embedded control. On the canvas, select the blue circle and drag the orange square into the green drop zone.
